channel.title: ziangsfoodworkshop TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ziangsfoodworkshop

item.title: If you like chicken ginger and spring onions from a Chinese takeout then this is a must try recipe for you! It’s really easy and simple to make too! Remember if you can, to sometime go and support your local Chinese takeaway as keeping small local busines
item.description: If you like chicken ginger and spring onions from a Chinese takeout then this is a must try recipe for you! It’s really easy and simple to make too! Remember if you can, to sometime go and support your local Chinese takeaway as keeping small local busines

item.title: Could I be the first person in the world to get the MS Fucking G molecule tattooed? If so scan someone get me a medal please? 🤣 All will be shown in the MSG documentary I’ve been filming coming early this year! Huge thanks to Calvin Eng, cookbook author a
item.description: Could I be the first person in the world to get the MS Fucking G molecule tattooed? If so scan someone get me a medal please? 🤣 All will be shown in the MSG documentary I’ve been filming coming early this year! Huge thanks to Calvin Eng, cookbook author a

item.title: If you like spicy Sichuan chicken from the Chinese takeout the you have to try this recipe out, this is infact the version we used to make in the takeaway I grew up in! Full length video is available for this for more in depth tips and cooking tricks 😊 an
item.description: If you like spicy Sichuan chicken from the Chinese takeout the you have to try this recipe out, this is infact the version we used to make in the takeaway I grew up in! Full length video is available for this for more in depth tips and cooking tricks 😊 an

item.title: If you like garlic then you have to try this recipe for Chinese takeaway mixed meat in garlic sauce 🧄🍗🥩🦐 #cooking #recipe #chef #chinesetakeaway #garlicsauce
item.description: If you like garlic then you have to try this recipe for Chinese takeaway mixed meat in garlic sauce 🧄🍗🥩🦐 #cooking #recipe #chef #chinesetakeaway #garlicsauce

item.title: If you like Chinese roast pork aka Char Siu then this recipe is for you! It’s super easy and you can batch make and freeze, plus the sauce left is bbq sauce!!! 🐷🔥 #cooking #recipes #chef #chinesetakeaway #chinesetakeout
item.description: If you like Chinese roast pork aka Char Siu then this recipe is for you! It’s super easy and you can batch make and freeze, plus the sauce left is bbq sauce!!! 🐷🔥 #cooking #recipes #chef #chinesetakeaway #chinesetakeout

item.title: With Lunar New Year fast approaching, and as noodles are such a big part of it, I thought I’d help you get ready for it, so if your celebrating LNY soon and If you’ve wondered what noodles takeaways and restaurants are using and how they would prepare the
item.description: With Lunar New Year fast approaching, and as noodles are such a big part of it, I thought I’d help you get ready for it, so if your celebrating LNY soon and If you’ve wondered what noodles takeaways and restaurants are using and how they would prepare the

item.title: If you like Hainanese chicken rice then you have to try this recipe hack for it. Simple and easy and perfect to celebrate the lunar new year with! 🍗🍚🧧 thank you green dragon for working with us on this video and the Thai fragrant rice is now sold in many
item.description: If you like Hainanese chicken rice then you have to try this recipe hack for it. Simple and easy and perfect to celebrate the lunar new year with! 🍗🍚🧧 thank you green dragon for working with us on this video and the Thai fragrant rice is now sold in many

item.title: Here is an update on our cooks books, the are were due in port on Friday but didn’t get confirmation of landing, only an email saying they were expected, then will take a week or so to get delivered to us, the. 2-3 weeks possibly longer to process pack an
item.description: Here is an update on our cooks books, the are were due in port on Friday but didn’t get confirmation of landing, only an email saying they were expected, then will take a week or so to get delivered to us, the. 2-3 weeks possibly longer to process pack an

item.title: If you like sweet and sour chicken, you need try this recipe for sweet and sour chicken Hong Kong style! The old school version of this can be found in my 1st cookbook, which is pre ordered only after selling out in November 2025! Not may left in pre orde
item.description: If you like sweet and sour chicken, you need try this recipe for sweet and sour chicken Hong Kong style! The old school version of this can be found in my 1st cookbook, which is pre ordered only after selling out in November 2025! Not may left in pre orde

item.title: If you like a Singapore chow mein then you need to try this recipe, personally I like to add garlic, but many takeaways won’t, and it’s where a lot of people go wrong trying to recreate the exact flavour at home, sometimes less is more to get that takeout
item.description: If you like a Singapore chow mein then you need to try this recipe, personally I like to add garlic, but many takeaways won’t, and it’s where a lot of people go wrong trying to recreate the exact flavour at home, sometimes less is more to get that takeout

item.title: If you like beef fried rice you have to try this recipe because it’s totally different from what you get in a Chinese takeaway or takeout, but it’s so good, thank you green dragon for working with on this and the Thai fragrant rice is available in UK @Sai
item.description: If you like beef fried rice you have to try this recipe because it’s totally different from what you get in a Chinese takeaway or takeout, but it’s so good, thank you green dragon for working with on this and the Thai fragrant rice is available in UK @Sai

item.title: We now have the cookbooks at our warehouse, which is nearly 2 weeks ahead of schedule! These will take a few weeks of not more to process and ship out, but we will be working non stop to get this done. We have now sold out of first cookbooks, but still ha
item.description: We now have the cookbooks at our warehouse, which is nearly 2 weeks ahead of schedule! These will take a few weeks of not more to process and ship out, but we will be working non stop to get this done. We have now sold out of first cookbooks, but still ha

item.title: Both cookbooks are now at the warehouse and are nearly 2 weeks ahead of schedule. We’re shipping out as fast as we can, which could take over 3 weeks with the amount of orders we’ve had, the team will be working as much as they can to get this done. If yo
item.description: Both cookbooks are now at the warehouse and are nearly 2 weeks ahead of schedule. We’re shipping out as fast as we can, which could take over 3 weeks with the amount of orders we’ve had, the team will be working as much as they can to get this done. If yo

item.title: Paid Promotion: If you like mushrooms and chow mein, then you need to try this Chinese takeaway recipe for an easy mushroom chow mein, and today we’re working with @LuckyBoatNoodles to help celebrate the Lunar New Year 🧧🐎 this recipe is the perfect way to
item.description: Paid Promotion: If you like mushrooms and chow mein, then you need to try this Chinese takeaway recipe for an easy mushroom chow mein, and today we’re working with @LuckyBoatNoodles to help celebrate the Lunar New Year 🧧🐎 this recipe is the perfect way to

item.title: Paid Promotion: To celebrate the Lunar New Year I have a Thai Tom Yum fried rice recipe for you to try 🇹🇭🍚🔥 I make this all the time for staff lunch and often use Thai fragrant rice for this dish, which brings me onto saying thank you to Green Dragon for
item.description: Paid Promotion: To celebrate the Lunar New Year I have a Thai Tom Yum fried rice recipe for you to try 🇹🇭🍚🔥 I make this all the time for staff lunch and often use Thai fragrant rice for this dish, which brings me onto saying thank you to Green Dragon for

item.title: If you like chicken chow mein then you have to try this recipe 🐓🍜 Happy Lunar New Year and huge thank you to @LuckyBoatNoodles for working with us on this video! I reached out to lucky boat about the long waits on Amazon for Lucky Boat noodles 900g boxes,
item.description: If you like chicken chow mein then you have to try this recipe 🐓🍜 Happy Lunar New Year and huge thank you to @LuckyBoatNoodles for working with us on this video! I reached out to lucky boat about the long waits on Amazon for Lucky Boat noodles 900g boxes,

item.title: If you want to support us make to watch us on the BBC iplayer live this Sunday, where the BBC will be covering the live festivities of the Lunar New Year 🧧 where we have been invited to the London BBC studios to talk about our Chinese food culture for thi
item.description: If you want to support us make to watch us on the BBC iplayer live this Sunday, where the BBC will be covering the live festivities of the Lunar New Year 🧧 where we have been invited to the London BBC studios to talk about our Chinese food culture for thi

item.title: Taking about Chinese food during the lunar new year live on bbc iplayer! #foodie #chef #chinesefood #ziangs #chinesetakeaway
item.description: Taking about Chinese food during the lunar new year live on bbc iplayer! #foodie #chef #chinesefood #ziangs #chinesetakeaway

item.title: Here is an update on our cookbooks if you haven’t seen it already, already emailed this a couple of times and made a few posts, but understand posts are easily missed #chinesefood #foodie #chef #cookbook #ziangs
item.description: Here is an update on our cookbooks if you haven’t seen it already, already emailed this a couple of times and made a few posts, but understand posts are easily missed #chinesefood #foodie #chef #cookbook #ziangs

item.title: There are 3 things I’ve learnt from being in the @BBC News channel 1) I need to hit the gym harder, I look like a talking pumpkin 2) I need to know that 7 isn’t 8, I said 7 dishes but it’s it’s actually 8 as 8 sounds like wealth in Chinese and 3) to not b
item.description: There are 3 things I’ve learnt from being in the @BBC News channel 1) I need to hit the gym harder, I look like a talking pumpkin 2) I need to know that 7 isn’t 8, I said 7 dishes but it’s it’s actually 8 as 8 sounds like wealth in Chinese and 3) to not b

item.title: We have less than 30 of our 2nd cookbooks left in stock, it won’t be reprinted so don’t miss out #chinesefood #chef #recipe #ziangs #chinesetakeaway
item.description: We have less than 30 of our 2nd cookbooks left in stock, it won’t be reprinted so don’t miss out #chinesefood #chef #recipe #ziangs #chinesetakeaway

item.title: If you like chicken chow mein 🍗🍜 you have to try this recipe, I’m now uploading the full long form videos of the short versions I post on here, as some of you might find them useful! #recipe #noodles #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein
item.description: If you like chicken chow mein 🍗🍜 you have to try this recipe, I’m now uploading the full long form videos of the short versions I post on here, as some of you might find them useful! #recipe #noodles #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein

item.title: HELP!! Non UK peeps, where are you based? We need to know so we can start to organise international shipping! Even if you’ve bought before, just commenting where you are will help us loads! Thank you in advance!#foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #zi
item.description: HELP!! Non UK peeps, where are you based? We need to know so we can start to organise international shipping! Even if you’ve bought before, just commenting where you are will help us loads! Thank you in advance!#foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #zi

item.title: First cookbooks have now all been shipped out, and we’ve found we had less than 100 left, this will be gone by the end of the weekend, so don’t miss out as this is the last time this Chinese takeaway cookbook will be available. The second cookbook we will
item.description: First cookbooks have now all been shipped out, and we’ve found we had less than 100 left, this will be gone by the end of the weekend, so don’t miss out as this is the last time this Chinese takeaway cookbook will be available. The second cookbook we will

item.title: Paid Promotion: The @LuckyBoatNoodles noodles are back in stock, was saying 7th of April at one point but now all back to normal, so you can go and make chow mein at home now! 🍜 #foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein
item.description: Paid Promotion: The @LuckyBoatNoodles noodles are back in stock, was saying 7th of April at one point but now all back to normal, so you can go and make chow mein at home now! 🍜 #foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein

item.title: Paid Promotion: If you like Chinese chicken satay skewers then you have to check this recipe out! Today we’re working with @Jimmy's Sate to bring you this quick and fast version of the Chinese takeaway classic! We’ve used jimmy’s for decades now and still
item.description: Paid Promotion: If you like Chinese chicken satay skewers then you have to check this recipe out! Today we’re working with @Jimmy's Sate to bring you this quick and fast version of the Chinese takeaway classic! We’ve used jimmy’s for decades now and still

item.title: Not even announced yet and we’re the Best Selling Chinese Cookery Book! 📕🔥😊 Our new cookbook is called “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” and is now available to pre order! If you're in the US or Australia, then the book will be out in January next yea
item.description: Not even announced yet and we’re the Best Selling Chinese Cookery Book! 📕🔥😊 Our new cookbook is called “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” and is now available to pre order! If you're in the US or Australia, then the book will be out in January next yea

item.title: If you like rice noodles, you have to try this recipe for beef chow fun, just like a Chinese takeaway or takeout will make it! #recipe #cooking #chef #chowfun #chinesetakeaway
item.description: If you like rice noodles, you have to try this recipe for beef chow fun, just like a Chinese takeaway or takeout will make it! #recipe #cooking #chef #chowfun #chinesetakeaway

item.title: If you like Chinese takeaway chicken curry 🍛🍗 then you have to try this recipe! This is more the Morden take on the curry and many places will be buying the paste in, so if you’re local does an epic curry, it’s probably been homemade, so support them if y
item.description: If you like Chinese takeaway chicken curry 🍛🍗 then you have to try this recipe! This is more the Morden take on the curry and many places will be buying the paste in, so if you’re local does an epic curry, it’s probably been homemade, so support them if y

item.title: If you like orange chicken you have to try this Chinese takeaway orange chicken recipe out, it’s so good and hits so hard 🍊🐓 this can be found in my new cookbook, which is on pre order right now #recipe #cooking #chicken #chinesetakeaway #orangechicken
item.description: If you like orange chicken you have to try this Chinese takeaway orange chicken recipe out, it’s so good and hits so hard 🍊🐓 this can be found in my new cookbook, which is on pre order right now #recipe #cooking #chicken #chinesetakeaway #orangechicken

item.title: Replying to @Lee Hudson If you’ve wondered what MSG, I explian it all here for you, any more questions just ask :) #recipe #foodtok #food #foodsciencefacts #monosodiumglutamate
item.description: Replying to @Lee Hudson If you’ve wondered what MSG, I explian it all here for you, any more questions just ask :) #recipe #foodtok #food #foodsciencefacts #monosodiumglutamate

item.title: Replying to @🦄LindsayG🦄 If you want to learn more about MSG and just gleating well in general follow Cara, Ive tagged her channel, she has loads of experience in dealing with these kind of comments and here videos are very informative, unlike mine where I
item.description: Replying to @🦄LindsayG🦄 If you want to learn more about MSG and just gleating well in general follow Cara, Ive tagged her channel, she has loads of experience in dealing with these kind of comments and here videos are very informative, unlike mine where I
